text.title: AI-Feature Trust Metrics for Market Research Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the rubric artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required fields + per-field constraints. Forbidden patterns listed at end.

example.note: Missing transparency/recovery/fairness; missing signal_event/survey_item; segments < 2; no baseline_date.

forbidden.pattern: dimensions missing any of the four
